name: Apparatus Clip Morph
pitch: Outgoing image is clipped by a shape. The shape morphs — shrinking inward while simultaneously transforming geometry (circle → diamond → thin vertical line → nothing) to reveal the next image.

lifecycle.idle: Active image is fully visible and unclipped, waiting for interaction
lifecycle.discovery: Hovering over the component scales the image slightly, triggering discovery
lifecycle.buildUp: Clicking starts the transition, causing the outer edges to contract into a rounded rectangle
lifecycle.peak: The clip-path reaches a circle and diamond shape, showcasing maximum geometry morphing at viewport center
lifecycle.recovery: The clip collapses to a thin vertical line and disappears, setting the new image as active and returning to idle
